calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Ema Bell's motion for approval of Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. The court will sign the previously submitted proposed order and proposed consent judgment.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
